__fixture__.name: managed_cloud_relay_disconnect
__fixture__.scenario: Managed-cloud deployment with a remote relay/attach transport drop while the sync, registry, auth/identity, policy, and docs-pack control-plane services remain healthy. Local editing, save, search, Git, tasks, docs inspection, export, and diagnostics remain available_local_safe; live remote execution and remote save block pending reconnect.

title: Managed-cloud relay disconnect with continue-local fallback
scenario_summary: Managed-cloud relay transport has disconnected while the sync, registry, auth/identity, policy, docs-pack, catalog, and telemetry control-plane services stay healthy; local editing, save, search, Git, tasks, docs inspection, export, and diagnostics continue against local state; remote execution, remote save, and streaming tasks block pending reconnect.

control_plane_state_by_service_class.note: Remote attach transport dropped; reconnect/backoff remains visible and cancellable.

data_plane_state_by_capability_class.note: Cached remote index remains readable; fresh remote indexing is paused until the relay is reachable.
Remote-attached tasks hold pending reconnect; already-running local tasks continue via the local_editing and local_save rows.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: inspect already available buffer and repo state
continue in local-only mode where the workflow allows
review remote identity and reconnect state
blocked_managed_only_capabilities: live remote execution or terminal streaming
remote save to the authoritative target
remote debug or task launch while disconnected
